name: legacy_import_strict_guard

stateIO: legacy-state detection now requires debtors/loans/claims/schedules/cashLogs to all exist and all be arrays
partial or malformed legacy raw-state inputs are rejected before snapshot normalization
normalizeSnapshotInput() no longer auto-fills missing core legacy collections with empty arrays
local: Local Restore now maps legacy_required_collections_missing and legacy_shape_invalid to a specific legacy-backup failure message
snapshot-v1 and valid full legacy raw-state backups remain supported

notes: snapshot-v1 envelope/build/trace/reset semantics are intentionally unchanged from v3.2.26.
This patch only tightens the legacy import gate for partial or malformed raw-state backups.
